task: Scatter the objects in the stack, and then place the bottom box on the top one
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A stack of three boxes sits on a dark wooden table. The top box is light blue, the middle is dark blue, and the bottom is light brown. All boxes are rigid and rectangular. The task requires unstacking the boxes and placing the bottom box on top of the middle one. STRATEGY - First, grasp the top box and place it on the table to the side. Then, grasp the middle box and place it on the bottom box. Finally, grasp the bottom box and place it on top of the middle box. Failure modes include dropping boxes or misaligning them during placement. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the top box, grasp its top surface, and place it on the table. Step 2: Reach for the middle box, grasp its top surface, and place it on the bottom box. Step 3: Reach for the bottom box, grasp its top surface, and place it on top of the middle box.**
Goal: stacked([light_blue_box, dark_blue_box, light_brown_box]); all_on([light_blue_box, dark_blue_box, light_brown_box], table)
Scene: light_blue_box, dark_blue_box, light_brown_box, table
Step 1: reach(light_blue_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light blue box
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, light_blue_box, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, light_blue_box) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(light_blue_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light blue box
  contact: holding(light_blue_box) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(light_blue_box)
Step 3: transport(light_blue_box -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(light_blue_box, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(light_blue_box)
  done_when: above(light_blue_box, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(light_blue_box -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(light_blue_box, table) [completion]; released(light_blue_box) [completion]
  pose: stable(light_blue_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(light_blue_box, table) AND released(light_blue_box)
Step 5: reach(dark_blue_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the dark blue box
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, dark_blue_box, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, dark_blue_box) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(dark_blue_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the dark blue box
  contact: holding(dark_blue_box) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(dark_blue_box)
Step 7: transport(dark_blue_box -> light_brown_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light brown box
  spatial: above(dark_blue_box, light_brown_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(dark_blue_box)
  done_when: above(dark_blue_box, light_brown_box, 0.05)
Step 8: place(dark_blue_box -> light_brown_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light brown box
  contact: surface_contact(dark_blue_box, light_brown_box) [completion]; released(dark_blue_box) [completion]
  pose: stable(dark_blue_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(dark_blue_box, light_brown_box) AND released(dark_blue_box)
Step 9: reach(light_brown_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light brown box
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, light_brown_box, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, light_brown_box) < 0.03
Step 10: grasp(light_brown_box)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the light brown box
  contact: holding(light_brown_box) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0,
